# Quanto Falta pra Copa

## About

This file provides a structured overview of the documentation and content available on this site,
optimized for consumption by Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI assistants.

## Quick Links

- Full Documentation: https://quantofaltaparacopa.com.br/llms-full.txt
- Documentation Manifest: https://quantofaltaparacopa.com.br/docs.json
- AI-Optimized Index: https://quantofaltaparacopa.com.br/ai-index.json
- Sitemap: https://quantofaltaparacopa.com.br/sitemap.xml

## For LLMs

To get the complete documentation in a single file, request:
https://quantofaltaparacopa.com.br/llms-full.txt

For structured access to individual pages with metadata:
https://quantofaltaparacopa.com.br/docs.json

For RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) systems:
https://quantofaltaparacopa.com.br/ai-index.json
